tool_use.param:
uv run python -c " from pathlib import Path import sys sys.path.insert(0, 'src') sys.path....[truncated 309 chars]...ngth validation'''
result = extract_title_from_pr(content) print(f'Result: {result!r}') "

session.tool_result: Result: 'This plan has no heading so extract_title_from_pr returns "Implementation Plan".'
session.assistant:
Aha! The issue is that `extract_title_from_pr` is returning the **first line** as a fallback, not "Implementation Plan". Looking at the function, it tries H1, then H2, then falls back to the first non-empty line. Only if there's no content at all does it return "Implementation Plan".
The test content starts with "This plan has no heading...", so that becomes the title. This title is NOT in the fallback set, so validation passes when it should fail. I need to make the test content truly empty of meaningful first lines:

tool_use.param:

# --- Title validation rejection tests (planned-PR path) ---
# Plan content with YAML fro...[truncated 298 chars]...3: Add tests and documentation\n" "- Step 4: More content to pass length validation" )

session.assistant:
Perfect! Everything is complete. Let me create a final summary:
## Implementation Complete ✅
Successfully implemented **Phase 2: Plan-to-PR File/Module Renames** (Objective #9318, Nodes 2.1–2.7) across 168 files.
### Summary of Changes
**Step 1 (Node 2.7): Consolidation & Rename** - Merged `plan_content.py` into `plan_utils.py`, then renamed to `pr_utils.py` - Moved `resolve_plan_content()` function - Consolidated `extract_title_from_plan` → `extract_title_from_pr` (now returns "Implementation Plan" fallback) - Renamed `wrap_plan_in_metadata_block` → `wrap_pr_in_metadata_block` - Updated all 6 import sites and merged test files
**Step 2 (Node 2.6): Dead Code Deletion** - Removed empty namespace marker `src/erk/core/plan_store/`
**Steps 3-6 (Nodes 2.2–2.5): Individual File Renames** - `plan_duplicate_checker.py` → `pr_duplicate_checker.py` (+ class rename, 2 import sites) - `plan_relevance_checker.py` → `pr_relevance_checker.py` (+ class rename, 2 import sites) - `plan_context_provider.py` → `pr_context_provider.py` (+ class rename, 12 import sites) - `plan_list_service.py` → `pr_list_service.py` (2 locations + tests, ~18 import sites)
**Step 7 (Node 2.1): Package Rename** - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/` → `pr_store/` - Bulk replaced `erk_shared.plan_store` → `erk_shared.pr_store` across ~130 files - Renamed test directories to `pr_store/`
**Step 8: Documentation Updates** - Updated 14 files in `docs/learned/` for renamed classes and modules
**Step 9: Verification** - ✅ `ruff check --fix` - 6 auto-fixes applied - ✅ `make ty` - all type checks pass - ✅ `make test` - 6048 tests pass - ✅ `erk pr check --stage=impl` - all checks pass
### PR Details - **PR #9352**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9352 - **Branch**: `plnd/O9318-plan-to-pr-file-rena-03-21-1416` - **Status**: Ready for review - **Linked to**: Objective #9318
All phases complete, tests passing, PR submitted successfully!
